transcript: Speaker A: Ma'am, what would you like to order? Speaker B: Um... this... um... idu. [Um... this... um... this.] Speaker A: Ma'am, what would you like to order? Speaker C: I'll have the grilled sandwich and a cold coffee. Um, could you please make the coffee a little less sweet? Speaker D: Madam, what kind of account would you like to open? Speaker B: Um... Kannada please. English little little. Speaker D: Madam, what kind of account would you like to open? Speaker C: A savings account, please. Also, I would like to know about the mobile banking facility. Speaker E: Ma'am, what treatment would you like today? Speaker B: Um... nanage English artha agilla. [Um... I don't understand English.] Speaker E: Ma'am, what treatment would you like to have today? Speaker C: I would like a cleanup and a hair spa. Also, would you suggest me any treatment for my dry hair? Speaker F: Nodidra? English maatadoke bandilla andre eshtu kashta agutte. Nanna friend obbaru nanage SpeakX app bagge helidru. Idondu AI English teaching app. Idaralli neevu English maatadodu kaliyabahudu. Adu bari hadinaidrandha ippattu dinadalli. Naanu pratidina bari hadinaidrandha ippattu nimisha practice maadde ee app alli. Ivaga nanna fluency nodi nimage artha aguttirabahudalla. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. Ee app nanna life eh change maadbidtu. Neevu kuda bari eradu roopaayiyalli elu dina trial tagondu nantara English maatadodu kaliyabahudu. Nanna maatu keli. Eegle hogi SpeakX app download maadi. [Did you see? How difficult it is if you don't know how to speak English. A friend of mine told me about the SpeakX app. This is an AI English teaching app. In this, you can learn to speak English. That too in just 15 to 20 days. I practiced for just 15 to 20 minutes every day on this app. Now looking at my fluency, you must have understood. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. This app changed my life. You too can take a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees and then learn to speak English. Listen to me. Go and download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: Before / After / Ma'am what would / idu / I'll have the / a cold coffee / make the coffee a / little less sweet? / Madam what kind of account / would you like to open? / Kannada please / English little little / A savings account please / know about the mobile / Ma'am what treatment / would you like today? / Nanage English artha agilla / Ma'am what treatment would / you like to have today? / a cleanup and a hair spa / suggest me ony treatment / for my dry hair? / Nodidra? / English maatadoke / bandilla andre / eshtu kashta agutte / Nanna friend obbaru nanage / SpeakX app bagge helidru / Idondu AI English / teaching app / Idaralli neevu English / maatadodu kaliyabahudu / Adu bari hadinaidrandha / ippattu dinadalli / Naanu pratidina / bari hadinaidrandha ippattu / nimisha practice / maadde ee app alli / Ivaga nanna fluency / nodi nimage / artha / aguttirabahudalla / I am very grateful / to SpeakX app / Ee app nanna life eh / change maadbidtu / Neevu kuda bari eradu / roopaayiyalli elu dina trial / tagondu nantara English / maatadodu kaliyabahudu / Nanna maatu keli / Eegle hogi / SpeakX app download maadi / Download SpeakX App / Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: The ad contrasts a woman's struggle to speak English in daily situations with her fluent communication after using the SpeakX app. The presenter shares her success story, attributing her improved fluency to practicing 15-20 minutes daily on the AI-powered app. She encourages viewers to download the app and start a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees.
